fields.comment: Mapped from structured Description. It maps to `description`. It is populated from the structured markdown label `Description`. Purpose: description exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. Populate it from the structured markdown field `Description`, after that field has been checked against canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `description`. The value type is `prose`. This is expected on every spell/template instance. Because this field is required, every spell should carry a deliberate value rather than relying on absence.

Mapped from structured Higher Levels. It maps to `higherLevels`. It is populated from the structured markdown label `Higher Levels`. Purpose: higherLevels exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. Populate it from the structured markdown field `Higher Levels`, after that field has been checked against canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `higherLevels`. The value type is `prose-or-empty`. This is expected on every spell/template instance. Because this field is required, every spell should carry a deliberate value rather than relying on absence.
